---
title: "Course Chapters"
subtitle: "Chapter and section index for the web version"
---

# Chapter Map

Use `chapters/` as the canonical source for web reading pages.
Each chapter owns an overview page and a set of section pages:

```text
chapters/
  chapter-01/
    index.qmd
    sections/
      01-research-loop.qmd
      02-net-returns-costs.qmd
```

The sidebar in `_quarto.yml` controls the visible chapter-section order on the
website.

# Chapters

## Chapter 01. A Minimal Quant Research Loop

- [Overview](chapter-01/index.qmd)
- [1.1 Research Loop](chapter-01/sections/01-research-loop.qmd)
- [1.2 Net Returns and Costs](chapter-01/sections/02-net-returns-costs.qmd)

# Authoring Convention

- Create one folder per chapter: `chapters/chapter-02/`.
- Put the chapter landing page at `chapters/chapter-02/index.qmd`.
- Put section pages under `chapters/chapter-02/sections/`.
- Prefix section filenames with two digits so file order matches reading order.
- Add the new pages to `website.sidebar.contents` in `_quarto.yml`.
